name: dataflow-ai
description: Monorepo for client, server, and ai-service

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "CLIENT,SERVER,AI" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.dev:ai: cd ai-service && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload
scripts.install:js: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../ai-service && python3 -m venv venv && . venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
